payload.description: The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2025.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2025.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan - January 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2025.
The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan reflecting the 2025 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service.
Annual report on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators.
Report on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and train ridership counts.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Operating Budget Results - May 2025

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Mid-Year Update on Railroad Operations - July 2025

payload.description: The agency will provide Mid-Year update on Railroad Operations.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Retail Development - July 2025

payload.description: MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
The agency will provide comprehensive report on the Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
2024 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan

tool_args.label: Finance responsible for 2025 Final Proposed Budget

payload.description: Finance is responsible for the 2025 Final Proposed Budget item

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metrics book

warnings: claim.source is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Source/program names are relation context, not claim type. Suggested relation: data_provided_by or part_of_program.

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurement items

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

payload.claim_text: The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2025 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2025 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2025 Adopted Budget.
payload.subject: 2025 Adopted Budget/Financial Plan

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
payload.subject: Work Plan

payload.claim_text: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints. In alternating quarters, the report will include additional information on diversity initiatives.
payload.subject: Diversity & EEO Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: MTA Police Report

payload.claim_text: A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.
payload.subject: 2024 Annual Ridership Report
